styles.css: &, & .wp-block-navigation__container { width: 100%; gap: 0; margin: 0; padding: 0; list-style: none; } & .wp-block-navigation-item { display: block; width: 100%; margin: 0; padding: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--wp--preset--color--secondary-100); } & .wp-block-navigation-item:last-child  { border-bottom: none; } & .wp-block-navigation-item .wp-block-navigation-item__content { padding: var(--wp--preset--spacing--12) 0; }
